texto: Collaborations are the black holes of knowledge regimes. They willingly produce nothingness, opulence and ill behavior. And it is their very vacuity that is their strength...It does not entail the transmission of something from those who have to those who do not, but rather the setting in motion of a chain of unforeseen accesses.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Florian Schneider sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “Collaborations are the black holes of knowledge regimes. They willingly produce nothingness, opul…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, collaboration, knowledge, útil em momentos de knowledge.
